text: I feel a sense of transition moving from the quiet, utilitarian corridor into this vibrant, purposeful exhibition space. There’s a shift from emptiness to presence, from anticipation to engagement. The bold colors and glowing text stimulate my curiosity—and I am drawn into the promise of innovation and discovery. This is a place where ideas meet matter, where research becomes visible. I feel alert, inspired, and slightly awed by the contrast between the two environments.
